name: ensembra
description: Multi-agent orchestrator plugin for Claude Code — agents perform in concert through a 5-phase pipeline (Gather → Deliberate → Execute → Audit → Document) with Reuse-First cross-cutting policy.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API key (optional — architect uses Ollama by default in v0.6.0+)
gemini_api_key.description: Google AI Studio API key. In v0.6.0+ the architect performer defaults to Ollama (qwen2.5:14b); Gemini is not required. This field is reserved for future MCP-based Gemini integration. Leave blank. Stored as a sensitive value in the OS keychain (not accessible from skill/agent content — this is the security invariant that v0.6.0 restored).

ollama_endpoint.title: Ollama endpoint
ollama_endpoint.description: Ollama HTTP endpoint for the security and qa performers. Default: http://localhost:11434. Leave blank to skip Ollama — those performers will fall back to Claude sub-agents.
